items.title: ‘It’s NOT right’ – Roy Keane fumes at controversial moment in France vs Morocco World Cup clash
items.summary: ROY KEANE slammed the World Cup refereeing team who delayed Kylian Mbappe's penalty for more than three minutes. items.title: Klopp reveals how Liverpool tried to sign Mbappe
items.summary: Jurgen Klopp says he "flew around in a circle" in a private plane with Kylian Mbappe and his family when he tried to sign him for Liverpool a decade ago.
